title: Lessburning Enchantment
description: Lessburning enchantment to reducre burning time
body: ### Lessburning enchantment for reducing burn time. #### Eatch armor piece reduces the burning time by 0.24 #### With full armor you only burn for ~1 sec you can use the command below to enchant you current armor with Lessburning enchant ``` /enchant @s runterya:lessburning ``` ### You can get that enchantment from - Enchanting Table - Trading with Librarian villager - On traded armors - Fishing
